attr.title: Pigments
attr.desc: Be a fruit locked in a room, dodge circular saws and paint as much of the level as you can! It's a pretty addictive score-attack game with very short runs, perfect for a coffee break!
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Itch.io or Steam. For Itch.io, download the MacOS version and extract the game files into gamedata folder. For Steam, download the MacOS depot via the Steam console using this command: download_depot 2339080 2339082 577923055002199486, then copy the files into gamedata folder.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Itch.io](https://punkcake.itch.io/pigments) or [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2339080/Pigments/). For `Itch.io`, download the `MacOS` version and extract the game files into `gamedata` folder. For `Steam`, download the `MacOS` depot via the [Steam console](steam://open/console) using this command: `download_depot 2339080 2339082 577923055002199486`, then copy the files into gamedata folder.
